/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/benchmark_itk.dir/benchmark_itk.cxx.o -o benchmark_itk  /opt/homebrew/opt/itk/lib/libITKIOTIFF-5.4.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/itk/lib/libITKIOImageBase-5.4.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/itk/lib/libITKMetaIO-5.4.1.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd /opt/homebrew/opt/itk/lib/libITKLabelMap-5.4.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/itk/lib/libITKMathematicalMorphology-5.4.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/itk/lib/libITKConvolution-5.4.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/itk/lib/libITKFFT-5.4.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/itk/lib/libITKSmoothing-5.4.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/itk/lib/libITKStatistics-5.4.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/itk/lib/libitkNetlibSlatec-5.4.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/itk/lib/libITKSpatialObjects-5.4.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/itk/lib/libITKTransform-5.4.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/itk/lib/libITKPath-5.4.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/itk/lib/libITKCommon-5.4.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/itk/lib/libitksys-5.4.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/itk/lib/libITKVNLInstantiation-5.4.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/itk/lib/libitkvnl_algo-5.4.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/itk/lib/libitkvnl-5.4.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/itk/lib/libitkv3p_netlib-5.4.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/itk/lib/libitkvcl-5.4.1.dylib -lm -lm -lfftw3_threads -lfftw3 -lfftw3f_threads -lfftw3f
